name: KITE REALTY GROUP TRUST
business: Kite Realty Group Trust is a publicly held REIT that owns interests in high-quality, open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers and mixed-use assets primarily in Sun Belt markets. The company derives revenue from contractual rents and reimbursement payments from tenants under existing lease agreements.
sellsTo: shopping center and mixed-use property lessees

exposures.sentence: E-commerce and other changes in consumer buying practices may impact our tenants and our business.

We continue to respond to these trends and are heavily focused on anchoring and diversifying our properties with tenants whose businesses are either more resistant to or synergistic with e-commerce, as well as adapting our properties to allow our tenants to serve as last-mile fulfillment centers.

installing electric vehicle (EV) charging stations (388 charging stations have been installed across 30 properties for a total of 18% of the portfolio as of December 31, 2025, with a goal of 20% of the portfolio by the end of 2026)

catalysts.event: Install EV charging stations at 20% of portfolio
catalysts.sentence: installing electric vehicle (EV) charging stations (388 charging stations have been installed across 30 properties for a total of 18% of the portfolio as of December 31, 2025, with a goal of 20% of the portfolio by the end of 2026)
We anticipate incurring the majority of the remaining costs for this project over the next 12 to 24 months

catalysts.event: Spend $130 million on tenant improvements for executed leases
catalysts.sentence: We currently anticipate incurring approximately $130 million in additional major tenant improvement costs related to executed leases for tenants not yet open at a number of our operating properties over the next 12 to 24 months.

catalysts.event: Board authorized $300 million increase to share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: in February 2026, our Board of Trustees authorized a $300.0 million increase to the size of the Share Repurchase Program, authorizing share repurchases up to a maximum of $600.0 million of our common shares.
